section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's blood pressure was recorded at 200/90 mmHg.
section_miscategorizations.reason: There are two different blood pressures listed in O (200/90 mmHg and 128/72 mmHg) without clarification of timing or context. Each value individually belongs in O, but presenting both together without distinction can be confusing from a documentation-quality standpoint. This is an organizational clarity issue rather than a true section misplacement.
